rules.description: Press J and K together to trigger F19
Press Left Shift ⇧ and Right Shift ⇧ together to toggle Caps Lock
Isolated Home Row Mods (Arrows Only) & Window Management
Right Option + Left Arrow to Right Option + Right Control (allows holding both modifiers for other keys)
Hyper + Fn keys trigger Mac media/hardware functions
Z + Slash simultaneously to toggle Caps Lock
Right Hyper + W/Z/X/C/E/V/Q → Window Management (Keyboard Maestro)

manipulators.description: Right Hyper + Z → KM: Window to left half

to.shell_command: osascript -e 'tell application "Keyboard Maestro Engine" to do script "Window to left half"'

manipulators.description: Right Hyper + C → KM: Window to right half

to.shell_command: osascript -e 'tell application "Keyboard Maestro Engine" to do script "Window to right half"'

manipulators.description: Right Hyper + W → KM: Window to top half

to.shell_command: osascript -e 'tell application "Keyboard Maestro Engine" to do script "Window to top half"'

manipulators.description: Right Hyper + X → KM: Window to bottom half

to.shell_command: osascript -e 'tell application "Keyboard Maestro Engine" to do script "Window to bottom half"'

manipulators.description: Right Hyper + E → KM: Window to next screen

to.shell_command: osascript -e 'tell application "Keyboard Maestro Engine" to do script "Window to next screen"'

manipulators.description: Right Hyper + V → KM: Window to full

to.shell_command: osascript -e 'tell application "Keyboard Maestro Engine" to do script "Window to full"'

manipulators.description: Right Hyper + Q → KM: Unminimize back window

to.shell_command: osascript -e 'tell application "Keyboard Maestro Engine" to do script "Unminize back window"'

rules.description: Caps Lock (Hyper) + H/J/K/L to Arrows (Allows Home Row Mod passthrough) == old
Press Left Shift ⇧ and Right Shift ⇧ together to toggle Caps Lock == old
